LanguageData.WB_EfficacyOfGiversHerbalTea.label: efficacy of giver's herbal tea
LanguageData.WB_EfficacyOfGiversHerbalTea.description: The efficacy of giver's herbal tea will temporarily improve your immunity and healing speed, allowing you to sleep more soundly than usual. This effect lasts for 3 days.
LanguageData.WB_SatietyOfThrumbocookies.label: satiety of giver's thrumbocookies
LanguageData.WB_SatietyOfThrumbocookies.description: I'm very full. I don't think I'll be hungry for a while.
LanguageData.WB_AdrenalineExcitement.label: adrenaline excitement
LanguageData.WB_InAGoodMood.label: in a good mood
LanguageData.WB_InAGoodMood.description: The Giver seems to be in a good mood today.
LanguageData.WB_StillHalfAsleepy.label: still half asleepy
LanguageData.WB_StillHalfAsleepyForMaster.label: still half asleepy
LanguageData.WB_InLowSpirits.label: in low spirits
LanguageData.WB_InLowSpirits.description: The Giver seems to be in low spirits today.
